01
Transform

Front Yard Installations

Two ways to transform your property — a quick, beautiful refresh, or a complete water-smart redesign. Both designed around Denver's climate, soil, and your property's specific light.

From $1,500
1-day install · no turf removal
Service 01 — Starter Install

Mulch Bed + Flower Planting

Colorado-native plants · Custom design · Steel edging

The perfect starting point. We design and install a custom mulch bed with drought-tolerant plants chosen for your property's light, soil, and style. Works with your existing lawn — no turf removal, no disruption. Immediate curb-appeal impact.

  • Custom plant selection from our 50-plant Colorado library
  • Cedar or bark mulch in your choice of color
  • Steel edging for a clean, finished border
  • Soil amendment for healthy plant establishment
  • Year 1 care guide included with every install
From $6,000
Complete redesign · 60–70% less water
Service 02 — Full Transformation

Full Xeriscape Transformation

Turf removal · Drip irrigation · Custom design

Our premium service. We remove existing turf and replace it with a fully designed water-smart landscape — drought-tolerant plants, decomposed granite or river rock, drip irrigation, and steel edging. Built for Denver's climate: your yard will look better than turf and cost far less to maintain.

  • Full design plan with custom plant layout and materials
  • Turf removal and disposal included
  • Drip irrigation installation and zone setup
  • Rock or DG ground cover, steel edging, soil amendment
  • Designed to qualify for water rebate programs
  • 2–5 day install depending on yard size
💧
Water Rebate Programs
Aurora GRIP: up to $4,000 for qualifying installs  ·  Castle Rock: $3.25/sq ft  ·  Fort Collins: up to $1,000. We design every install to qualify — ask us about your municipality's current program.
02
Build

Custom Hardscaping

We design and build outdoor living spaces that make your property more functional, more beautiful, and more valuable — with materials engineered for Denver's freeze-thaw climate.

Service 03

Fire Pit

Brick + Paver Surround
From $2,500

Custom fire pit with brick or paver surround. Turns a backyard into an outdoor living room. Built to last through Colorado winters.

Service 04

Flagstone Pathway

Natural Stone + Gravel Base
From $1,500

Natural stone pathway adding structure, polish, and function. Complements any planting style and lifts the whole yard.

Service 05

Patio

Decomposed Granite Seating Area
From $1,500

Clean, low-maintenance outdoor seating. Excellent for small Denver yards. Fast install, high impact, pairs perfectly with a fire pit.

Service 06

Retaining Wall

Block + Stone Construction
From $3,000

Solves slope and erosion problems while adding visual structure. Essential for Denver properties with grade changes.

Service 07

Landscape Lighting

Low Voltage + LED
From $800

Low-voltage LED lighting transforms any install after dark — dramatically increasing perceived value and making your property stand out on the block at night. Half-day install, extraordinary results. Add to any project or book it standalone.

03
Maintain

Year-Round Care

Your yard stays sharp year-round without you lifting a finger. Every install client receives a plan offer before we leave — but you can sign up independently. No install required.

"We don't just build it and leave. We take care of what we create — so your investment looks as good in year five as it did on install day."

from $140 /mo
April through October
Best for: anyone who just wants a sharp lawn

  • Edging along walks and beds
